raw_title: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_en: Predictive Data Stories: Characterizing a Nascent Data-Journalistic Genre
title_zh: 预测性数据故事：描述一种新兴的数据新闻类型
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章研究了一种新兴的新闻类型——预测性数据故事。它探讨了如何利用大数据和数据分析来预测未来事件，并分析这种新闻形式的特点和发展趋势。
plain_summary_en: This article examines an emerging type of journalism called predictive data stories. It explores how big data and data analysis are used to predict future events, and analyzes the characteristics and development trends of this journalistic form.
research_direction_zh: 研究数据新闻的创新形式，特别是预测性报道如何改变传统新闻实践，以及它对媒体行业和社会的影响。
research_direction_en: Investigating innovative forms of data journalism, particularly how predictive reporting transforms traditional news practices and its impact on the media industry and society.
